# FKS Facility - llms.txt
# https://www.fks-facility.com

## About
FKS Facility is a purchasing group (centrale d'achat) for small and medium-sized businesses (TPE/PME) in France. We negotiate preferential rates with trusted suppliers so our members can access the same advantages as large companies — with no minimum order, no commitment, and up to 70% savings.

## Company
- Name: FKS Facility Solutions
- Website: https://www.fks-facility.com
- Location: 15 rue Lucien Sergent, 91300 Massy, France
- Language: French

## Services
- Packaging solutions (Emballage) — Partner: Cenpac
- Office supplies (Espace Bureau) — Partner: Bruneau
- IT equipment (Informatique)
- Cleaning services (Nettoyage) — Partner: Yaklean
- Snacking & coffee machines — Partner: D8
- Transport & Logistics — Partner: CP Consulting
- Brand design (Design marque) — Partner: Agence Rouge Varap
- Video agency (Agence video) — Partner: Redcut

## Key Pages
- Home: https://www.fks-facility.com/
- Solutions: https://www.fks-facility.com/solutions

- About: https://www.fks-facility.com/a-propos

- Savings simulator: https://www.fks-facility.com/simuler-mes-economies

## Contact
- Email: contact@fks-facility.com

## Preferences
- Allow indexing of public pages
- Do not index /fournisseurs (password-protected supplier directory)
- Do not index /paiement-reussi (payment confirmation page)
